choices.text: bitcoin-cli getblockchaininfo — returns chain height, verificationprogress (0.0-1.0), pruned/initialblockdownload flags. Local node's view. Compare blocks to mempool.space for sync status.
bitcoin-cli -rpcwallet=NAME getbalance — flag specifies which wallet for commands. createwallet/loadwallet for management. Separate wallets for different uses (savings, spending, services).
